name: civui
description: CivUI - Civic Design System: Accessibility-first web components for government applications

scripts.lint:double-labels:
pnpm --filter @civui/compound exec vitest run src/_lint/double-labels.test.ts || (echo '
→ see .claude/rules/common-traps.md#double-labelled-form-controls' && exit 1)
scripts.lint:missing-labels:
pnpm --filter @civui/compound exec vitest run src/_lint/missing-labels.test.ts || (echo '
→ see .claude/rules/common-traps.md#unlabelled-form-controls-inside-compound-components' && exit 1)
scripts.lint:stacked-required:
pnpm --filter @civui/compound exec vitest run src/_lint/stacked-required.test.ts || (echo '
→ see .claude/rules/common-traps.md#section-legends-dont-carry-required-leaf-inputs-do' && exit 1)
scripts.lint:form-reset-callback:
pnpm --filter @civui/compound exec vitest run src/_lint/form-reset-callback.test.ts || (echo '
→ see .claude/rules/common-traps.md#compound-formresetcallback-must-reset-_data-not-just-value' && exit 1)
scripts.lint:required-cascade:
pnpm --filter @civui/compound exec vitest run src/_lint/required-cascade.test.ts || (echo '
→ see .claude/rules/common-traps.md#multi-field-compounds-must-cascade-required-to-at-least-one-leaf' && exit 1)
scripts.validate:lints: pnpm lint:fieldsets && pnpm lint:story-embeds && pnpm lint:story-names && pnpm lint:story-props && pnpm lint:prose-refs && pnpm lint:color-classes && pnpm lint:jsdoc-props && pnpm lint:jsdoc-events && pnpm lint:safelist-stale && pnpm lint:hardcoded-tokens && pnpm lint:muted-body-text && pnpm lint:status-body-text && pnpm lint:combobox-no-autocomplete && pnpm lint:readonly-cascade && pnpm lint:schema-pointer && pnpm lint:schema-enum-values && pnpm lint:schema-default-values && pnpm lint:option-value-parity && pnpm lint:schema-analytics-event && pnpm lint:sdc-enum-values && pnpm lint:icon-names && pnpm lint:coverage-trinity && pnpm lint:category-overview && pnpm lint:event-listener-leak && pnpm lint:host-display && pnpm lint:schema-a11y-role && pnpm lint:purged-variants && pnpm lint:undefined-css-vars && pnpm lint:dead-properties && pnpm lint:border-radius && pnpm lint:density-modifier-names && pnpm lint:hardcoded-spacing && pnpm lint:between-block-cadence && pnpm lint:wcag-text-spacing && pnpm lint:contrast && pnpm lint:semantic-color-recipe && pnpm lint:dark-recipe-contrast && pnpm lint:hardcoded-hex && pnpm lint:ios-stub-allowlist && pnpm lint:double-labels && pnpm lint:missing-labels && pnpm lint:stacked-required && pnpm lint:form-reset-callback && pnpm lint:required-cascade
scripts.preflight: pnpm typecheck && pnpm validate:lints && pnpm parity:schema --platforms && pnpm validate:schemas && pnpm validate:doc-tables
scripts.validate: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm parity:schema --platforms && pnpm validate:schemas && pnpm validate:drift && pnpm validate:builds && pnpm validate:verify-forms && pnpm test:tools
